cmdline:
"C:\Program Files\Git\bin\bash.exe" -c "source /c/Users/carol/.claude/shell-snapshots/snapshot-bash-1773800279311-gxqym6.sh && shopt -u extglob 2>/dev/null || true && eval 'cd \"/c/Users/carol/OneDrive/Desktop/Simply So - Local\" && \
echo \"=== MOVING REPORTS ===\" && \
cp intelligence/daily/*.html Reports/daily/ && \
cp intelligence/summaries/weekly/*.html intelligence/summaries/weekly/*.xlsx Reports/weekly/ && \
cp intelligence/summaries/monthly/*.html intelligence/summaries/monthly/*.xlsx Reports/monthly/ && \
cp intelligence/monthly/*.html Reports/monthly/ 2>/dev/null; \
cp -r intelligence/competitors/2026-03 Reports/competitors/2026-03 && \
cp intelligence/competitors/competitor-news-*.md Reports/competitors/ && \
cp -r intelligence/news/deep-dives/* Reports/deep-dives/ 2>/dev/null; \
echo \"=== MOVING CONTENT ===\" && \
cp content/drafts/* Content/drafts/ 2>/dev/null; \
cp content/calendars/* Content/calendars/ 2>/dev/null; \
cp content/published/* Content/published/ 2>/dev/null; \
cp -r \"Linkedin Content Production\"/* Content/linkedin/ && \
echo \"=== MOVING SYSTEM ===\" && \
cp scripts/* .system/scripts/ && \
cp -r intelligence/trends/daily/* .system/data/trends/daily/ && \
cp -r intelligence/trends/biweekly/* .system/data/trends/biweekly/ && \
cp -r intelligence/trends/monthly/* .system/data/trends/monthly/ && \
cp -r intelligence/trends/tiktok/* .system/data/trends/tiktok/ && \
cp -r intelligence/trends/top-charts/* .system/data/trends/top-charts/ 2>/dev/null; \
cp intelligence/trends/keyword-watchlist.md .system/data/keyword-watchlist.md && \
cp -r intelligence/news/daily/* .system/data/news/daily/ && \
cp -r future-builds/* .system/future-builds/ && \
cp -r research/* .system/research/ && \
cp BUILD-LOG.md .system/BUILD-LOG.md && \
echo \"=== ALL COPIES DONE ===\"' \< /dev/null && pwd -P >| /c/Users/carol/AppData/Local/Temp/claude-89b6-cwd"

name: MaliciousModule

description: User hashes from SAM hive accessed from signed executable with untrusted root authority
name: SAMHashDump.Untrusted

threatgraph_indicators.description: The command line of this process was modified from its original form prior to finalizing process creation. This might be related to command line stomping attacks. Investigate the process tree.

A process loaded a likely malicious DLL. This is indicative of activity to take advantage of the Windows DLL search order to gain persistence or elevated privileges on the system. Review the process tree.
User hashes from SAM hive accessed from signed executable with untrusted root authority
A process appears to be suspiciously executing code via Powershell. Investigate the command line and process tree.
